title: Leen Ammeraal
text: Home * People * Leen Ammeraal Leen Ammeraal [1] Leen Ammeraal , a Dutch mathematician and computer scientist, former lecturer at Utrecht University of Applied Sciences (Hogeschool Utrecht), and as computer chess programmer author of the chess engine Queen , and based on Queen, the Android app Senior Chess [2] . Leen is also author and co-author of programming books about C++ , Java and Computer Graphics .
